title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 86.247 - Annual valuation of assets and liabilities
text:
86.247.  Annual valuation of assets and liabilities. — On the basis of such tables as the board of trustees shall adopt, the actuary shall make an annual valuation of the assets and liabilities of the system created by sections 86.200 to 86.366.
(L. 1957 p. 256 § 15, A.L. 2000 H.B. 1808) 
Effective 7-01-00
